name: Fame | Chapter Two
description:
The early morning hours of a famous person, how unproductive.

📸📸📸

Isn't this crazy. . .a chapter two to my fame bot?! Who'da throught, right?

It's very similar to the last, it's just the morning of it.

You can do as you please, scandals, and what not. I don't personally care but I'd love to hear some goofy ass stories.

I hope you guys love part 2.

I hope you like the introduction, I tried my best to do it even though it's probably not the best for real.

I am open to requests.

Love you, my strawberries.
creator: Strawberry_Paradise
